default.subject: AHA Update - {location}
default.body:
Hello {first_name},

Please complete the required AHA steps for {location}.

If you have questions, reply to this email.

TN Film.subject: TN Film AHA Instructions
TN Film.body:
Hello,

Thank you for registering with CPR Lifeline at our 810 Dominican Dr., Suite 116A, Nashville, TN location for your upcoming AHA course.

Below are a few details you will need to enter the suite:

• You can let reception know you have an appointment with CPR Lifeline in Suite 116A.
• The suite door will be unlocked and we ask that you leave it unlocked as you exit. If you have any issues, please see reception.
• After your session is complete, please be sure to wipe both manikins with the provided Lysol wipes to leave ready for our next student.

Info to set up your RQI Account:

If you have not already, you will be receiving an important email from RQI1stop.com very soon. You will have to set up an account at https://cprlifeline.rqi1stop.com prior to beginning your AHA HeartCode online course and/or hands on skills check.

For any issues signing into RQI or if you have technical issues while taking the skills check, RQI's technical help line is: 1-800-594-9935.

Please do not bring any food or drink into the office. Trashcans are only emptied 1 time a week. After you have completed the skills check please wipe down the manikins and replace the clothing.

If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. We greatly appreciate your business and are here to make it a smooth and easy process.

Thank you,
Chris Peters
CPR Lifeline
877-422-7755
https://cprlifeline.net/
info@cprlifeline.net
after hours - (209) 499-2249

TN Music.subject: TN Music AHA Instructions
TN Music.body:
Hello,

Thank you for registering with CPR Lifeline at our 1 Music Circle North REGUS, Suite 418, Nashville, TN location for your upcoming course.

Below are a few details you will need to access the suite:

• You can park in the lower parking lot under the building accessed from Music Circle East OR there is plenty of free parking along the street.
• CPR Lifeline's Suite is on the 4th floor.
• You can let reception know you have an appointment with CPR Lifeline in Suite 418.
• The suite door code for easy entry is 0418.
• If you have any issues, please see reception.
• After your session is complete, please be sure to wipe both manikins with the provided Lysol wipes to leave ready for our next student.

TN Brentwood.subject: TN Brentwood AHA Instructions
TN Brentwood.body:
Hello,

Thank you for registering with CPR Lifeline at our 201 Summit View Drive REGUS, Suite 300, Office #320, Brentwood, TN location for your upcoming AHA course.

Below are a few details you will need to enter the suite:

• As you turn onto Summit View Drive, go left up the hill and park in the 3rd lot on the right. If there is no parking, you can continue up and park in the last (4th) lot on the right.
• Enter the building and the elevator and go up to the 3rd floor and enter the glass doors on the right that say REGUS.
• You can let reception know you have an appointment with CPR Lifeline in Suite 320.
• If there is no office personnel working and the door is locked, please call us so we can assist you entering the Regus office doors.
• The door code to let you in to Suite 320 is 0320.
• After your session is complete, please be sure to wipe both manikins with the provided Lysol wipes to leave ready for our next student.

Info to set up your RQI Account:

If you have not already, you will be receiving an important email from RQI1stop.com very soon. You will have to set up an account at https://cprlifeline.rqi1stop.com prior to beginning your AHA HeartCode online course and/or hands on skills check.

For any issues signing into RQI or if you have technical issues while taking the skills check, RQI's technical help line is: 1-800-594-9935.

Please do not bring any food or drink into the office. Trashcans are only emptied 1 time a week. After you have completed the skills check please wipe down the manikins and replace the clothing.

If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. We greatly appreciate your business and are here to make it a smooth and easy process.

Thank you,

TN Bartlett.subject: TN Bartlett AHA Instructions
TN Bartlett.body:
Hello,

Thank you for registering with CPR Lifeline at our 3189 Kirby Whitten Road, Suite 203E, Bartlett, TN location for your upcoming AHA course.

Below are a few location details you will need to access the suite:

• We are located on the second floor, enter through the front door and up the stairs. The door at the top of the stairs requires the code 1144 to enter.
• There will be another door to your left with another code lock which requires the same code to enter - 1144.
• Go down the hall and you will see Suite E with CPR Lifeline on the door. To access the Suite you will again need to enter the code 1144.

TN Perkins.subject: TN Perkins AHA Instructions
TN Perkins.body:
Hello,

Thank you for registering with CPR Lifeline at our 3885 S. Perkins, Suite #1, Office #19, Memphis, TN location for your upcoming AHA course.

Below are a few details you will need to access the suite:

• Enter through Suite 1 door. If it is locked or it is after hours, use the door code 0215 to enter.
• As soon as you enter, make an immediate left and go down the hall to the right and you will see Office #19 towards the end of the hall on the left-hand side with CPR Lifeline on the door.
• To access the Suite you will need to enter 3885 (the location address).
• After your session is complete, please be sure to wipe both manikins with the provided Lysol wipes to leave ready for our next student.

Information to set up your RQI account

If you have not already, you will be receiving an important email from RQI1stop.com very soon. You will have to set up an account at https://cprlifeline.rqi1stop.com prior to beginning your AHA HeartCode online course and/or hands on skills check.

For any issues signing into RQI or if you have technical issues while taking the skills check, RQI's technical help line is: 1-800-594-9935.

Please do not bring any food or drink into the office. Trash cans are only emptied 1 time a week. After you have completed the skills check please wipe down the manikins and replace the clothing.

If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. We greatly appreciate your business and are here to make it a smooth and easy process.

Thank you,
Chris Peters
CPR Lifeline
877-422-7755

GA Chamblee.subject: GA Chamblee AHA Instructions
GA Chamblee.body:
Hello,

Thank you for registering with CPR Lifeline at our 2900 Chamblee Tucker Rd., Building 11, office 100C, Chamblee, GA location for your upcoming course.

***Building 11 is out of numerical order and located at the very end of the street.***

Below are a few details you will need to access the suite:

• We are located in Building 11, office #100C which is inside the building and then down the stairs.
• The exterior door code to enter the building is 3440.
• The code to enter our office (door #100C) is 2900. Enter 2900 into the keypad on the office door for easy entrance.
• After your session is complete, please be sure to wipe both manikins with the provided Lysol wipes to leave ready for our next student.

Information to set up your RQI account

If you have not already, you will be receiving an important email from RQI1stop.com very soon. You will have to set up an account at https://cprlifeline.rqi1stop.com prior to beginning your AHA HeartCode online course and/or hands on skills check.

For any issues signing into RQI or if you have technical issues while taking the skills check, RQI's technical help line is: 1-800-594-9935.

Please do not bring any food or drink into the office. Trash cans are only emptied 1 time a week. After you have completed the skills check please wipe down the manikins and replace the clothing.

If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. We greatly appreciate your business and are here to make it a smooth and easy process.

GA Exchange.subject: GA Exchange AHA Instructions
GA Exchange.body:
Hello,

Thank you for registering with CPR Lifeline at our 1755 The Exchange, office #183, Atlanta, GA location for your upcoming course.

Below are a few details you will need to access the suite:

• The building main door will be unlocked during normal business hours. For after hours access use the code 6161 to enter the building.
• We are located in office #183, through the main entrance, straight past the lobby, the office is on the left across from the mailboxes.
• The code to enter our office (door #183) is 0800. Enter 0800 into the deadbolt keypad on the office door and turn the deadbolt knob to enter the office.
• When leaving the office please use the keypad and deadbolt knob to lock the door.
• After your session is complete, please be sure to wipe both manikins with the provided Lysol wipes to leave ready for our next student.

Information to set up your RQI account

If you have not already, you will be receiving an important email from RQI1stop.com very soon. You will have to set up an account at https://cprlifeline.rqi1stop.com prior to beginning your AHA HeartCode online course and/or hands on skills check.
